recommendations.title: Babyteeth
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill teen upsets her parents when she falls in love with a small-time drug dealer.

recommendations.title: Wrong Turn at Tahoe
recommendations.overview: A small-time crime boss kills a drug dealer without realizing that the drug dealer works for the biggest crime boss in the country.

recommendations.title: Bullet
recommendations.overview: A tough, Jewish ex-con just released from prison crosses a powerful drug dealer and former prison rival in his return to a life of crime.

recommendations.title: Outlaw
recommendations.overview: At the age of nine, Rebeca is sold by her grandmother to the bookseller who ran Rocinha. Disputed by bicheiros and drug dealers, the community is going through changes in power. Rebeca becomes the wife of the chief drug dealer and, with the death of

recommendations.title: City of God
recommendations.overview: In the poverty-stricken favelas of Rio de Janeiro in the 1970s, two young men choose different paths. Rocket is a budding photographer who documents the increasing drug-related violence of his neighborhood, while José “Zé” Pequeno is an ambitious dru

recommendations.title: Sugar Hill
recommendations.overview: In the Harlem neighborhood of New York City, the Mafia steps in when a drug dealer quits his partner and brother to lead a straight life with his girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Twelve
recommendations.overview: A young drug dealer watches as his high-rolling life is dismantled in the wake of his cousin's murder, which sees his best friend arrested for the crime.

recommendations.title: Redeeming Love
recommendations.overview: A young couple's relationship clashes with the harsh realities of the California Gold Rush of 1850. Angel, experiencing love for the first time and facing demons unsurmountable, runs from the new life she doesn't believe she deserves. When Michael se

recommendations.title: Killing Cabos
recommendations.overview: Two young men get involved with some criminals while trying to free the tycoon they kidnapped.

recommendations.title: Super Fly
recommendations.overview: Priest, a New York City drug kingpin, devises a scheme to get out of the business and retire with a big payday, but his plans are complicated when a street dealer rats him out to the police.
